# Code of Conduct

I want this project to be a friendly place for anyone interested in language learning, open data, and software engineering.

**Please:**
- Be respectful and constructive.
- Help others when you can.
- Focus on ideas, not people.

**Not okay:**
- Personal attacks, harassment, or rude behavior.
- Putting down contributors based on language skills or experience.

---

If something feels off, you can contact me directly [here](mailto:code@julian-hirsch.com). Thanks for keeping things welcoming!
